name: Icon Callout Box Section
notes: Light Blue #E6F0F9 box (radius 40px 8px 40px 8px), inset from left W/2=40px, left-padding W/2+24px. White 80x80 badge (radius 20px 4px 20px 4px) with Dark Navy 0.18 drop shadow straddling box left edge, Brand Blue line icon ~48px. Text Brand Blue Nunito Sans 800 ~21px/28px vertically centered. Outlook degrade caveat; pre-composited PNG option for fidelity. Section bg White, padding 16px 25px.
